subject: Braviary, a large raptor-type Pokemon with broad wings spread mid-flight, blue and red plumage
description: Braviary dominates the frame in a steep diving posture, wings fully extended and angled back. The plumage is vivid blue on the body and face with a red-and-white crest feather arrangement. The talons are forward and the beak is open, suggesting an attack dive. The background is a bright open sky with diffuse light, making the bird's silhouette pop against pale blue-white space.
foreground: Braviary diving with wings spread, talons forward
